title: The Cabin
intro: Recently renovated in 2022, the cabin spans three levels and 1,800 square feet — four queen bedrooms, a bunk room, two living rooms, and a bathroom on every floor. Everything below is included with your stay.

amenityGroups.title: The Essentials
items: Fast WiFi (QR code at the door)
Heaters and fans in every bedroom (no A/C)

amenityGroups.title: Full Kitchen
items: Coffee maker, espresso machine & bean grinder
Air fryer, blender, mixer & crock pot

amenityGroups.title: 4 Bedrooms
items: Heater and fan in each room
Desks with monitors in 2 bedrooms — work from the woods

amenityGroups.title: Utilities & Safety
items: Carbon monoxide detectors on each floor

petPolicy.title: Bringing Your Dog
items: Up to 2 dogs — no other animals, please
Dogs on leash outside at all times
Please pick up after your dog and use the trash receptacle
Large wire dog crate available under the bed in the main-level bedroom
Clean up pet accidents right away — pet damage may affect your deposit

rules.title: House Rules
items: Check-in after 4:00 PM · Check-out before 11:00 AM
Minimum age to rent: 25 — younger guests must be accompanied by a parent or legal guardian
Parking for 4 vehicles in the driveway, free of charge — long enough for a pickup and trailer
Exterior security cameras only: front, side, and back of home
